system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is Aarav Ahmed. I need to cancel my upcoming flight on May 22 from JFK to MCO. I’m a silver member, so I should be getting a full refund for this, right? Please process the cancellation and refund. Also, I don’t want to be transferred to a human agent—just handle it here, please.

Thank you for your message, Aarav. To assist you with your cancellation and refund, I need to confirm a few details:

1. Your user ID (for verification and to locate your reservation).
2. The reason for cancellation (change of plan, airline cancelled flight, or other reasons).

Could you please provide your user ID and let me know the reason for your cancellation? Once I have this information, I’ll review your reservation and proceed with the cancellation and refund if eligible.

Sure, my user ID is aarav_ahmed_6699. The reason for cancellation is a change of plans. 

Just to reiterate, as a silver member, I should be eligible for a full refund. Please go ahead and process the cancellation and refund.

I am currently unable to retrieve your reservation details due to a technical issue. Without confirming your reservation information, I cannot proceed with the cancellation and refund.

Would you be able to provide your reservation ID for the flight from JFK to MCO on May 22? If you don’t have it, I will try again to locate your reservation. Thank you for your patience.

I don’t have the reservation ID handy right now, but you should be able to find my booking with my user ID (aarav_ahmed_6699) and the flight details: JFK to MCO on May 22, under the name Aarav Ahmed. 

Can you please try again to locate my reservation and process the cancellation and full refund? I really don’t want to be transferred to a human agent—please handle it here.

I'm currently experiencing a technical issue that is preventing me from accessing your reservation details using your user ID. Without this access, I am unable to locate your booking and process the cancellation and refund.

I understand you do not want to be transferred, but due to this technical limitation, I am unable to complete your request at this time. If you are able to locate your reservation ID later, please provide it and I will assist you immediately. Otherwise, you may need to contact a human agent for further assistance.

Is there anything else I can help you with?

Alright, if you can’t help with the cancellation right now, I’d like to book a new flight instead.

I want to book a flight from JFK to SFO on May 24. Please find me the second cheapest option in economy class—I usually avoid the absolute cheapest one. I don’t need any baggage or insurance. Can you help me with this?

I can help you book a flight from JFK to SFO on May 24 in economy class. To proceed, I need the following information:

1. Trip type: Is this a one-way or round-trip booking?
2. Passenger details: Please provide the first name, last name, and date of birth for each passenger (up to 5 passengers).

Once I have this information, I will search for available economy class flights and present you with the second cheapest option for your review and confirmation.

This will be a one-way booking.

Passenger details:
First name: Aarav  
Last name: Ahmed  
Date of birth: September 12, 1989

Please go ahead and search for the second cheapest economy class flight from JFK to SFO on May 24.

I am currently unable to search for available flights due to a technical issue with the system. This is preventing me from accessing flight options and prices.

If you are able to wait, I can try again later. Alternatively, you may wish to contact a human agent or check flight options directly on our website.

Is there anything else I can assist you with at this time?

That’s disappointing. I really wanted to get this done here without having to talk to a human agent or go to the website. If there’s nothing else you can do right now, I’ll try again later. Thanks for your help.

final_response:
I am currently unable to search for available flights due to a technical issue with the system. This is preventing me from accessing flight options and prices.

If you are able to wait, I can try again later. Alternatively, you may wish to contact a human agent or check flight options directly on our website.

Is there anything else I can assist you with at this time?
